description: A customer wants to book a one-way flight from New York (JFK) to Los Angeles (LAX) for next Friday.

nodes.task_description: Search for available one-way flights from JFK to LAX for the specified date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds several flight options and presents them to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Select the flight chosen by the customer and create a new booking with their passenger details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a booking record with the correct flight and passenger information.

nodes.task_description: Process the customer's credit card payment and issue the electronic ticket.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully takes payment and issues a ticket, providing the customer with a confirmation number.
